headline: Deere faces latest right-to-repair lawsuit; this time about construction
summary: A $99 million settlement proposal with a group of farmers and independent agriculture repair shop owners received preliminary approval this week in a separate case.

raw.headline: Deere faces latest right-to-repair lawsuit; this time about construction
raw.summary: A $99 million settlement proposal with a group of farmers and independent agriculture repair shop owners received preliminary approval this week in a separate case.

headline: Sherwin Williams Earns Recognition as a John Deere "Partner-Level Supplier" and Supplier of the Year
summary: John Deere recognized Sherwin-Williams General Industrial as a Partner-level supplier for 2025 and also named the Company John Deere Indirect Global Supplier of the Year in the John Deere Achieving Excellence Program. The Partner-level status is Deere & Company's highest supplier rating.

raw.headline: Sherwin Williams Earns Recognition as a John Deere "Partner-Level Supplier" and Supplier of the Year
raw.summary: John Deere recognized Sherwin-Williams General Industrial as a Partner-level supplier for 2025 and also named the Company John Deere Indirect Global Supplier of the Year in the John Deere Achieving Excellence Program. The Partner-level status is Deere & Company's highest supplier rating.

headline: 50. Apptronik
summary: Apptronik, which makes humanoid robots for work environments, ranks No. 50 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.

raw.headline: 50. Apptronik
raw.summary: Apptronik, which makes humanoid robots for work environments, ranks No. 50 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.
